requirements.task_name: Choose a base IPTV plan with 100+ channels under $20/month billed yearly
requirements.task_description: Select a subscription plan that costs less than $20 per month, includes at least 100 channels, is billed annually, and proceed to the checkout page with that plan selected.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully finding the plan and validating that (a) plan.monthly_price < 20, (b) plan.channel_count >= 100, and (c) billingCycle === 'annual'. When these conditions hold, set this variable.
required_variables.reason: Capture which specific plan the user selected that meets the Task 1 constraints (under $20/month, 100+ channels, annual billing), before later tasks overwrite the draft subscription_change.

required_variables.set_condition: When getCheckoutSummary finds a draft subscription_change where: (1) selected_plan_id is not null, and (2) either selected_plan_id equals localStorage.task1_selectedPlanId (if set) OR the corresponding plan has monthly_price < 20, channel_count >= 100, and the draft selected_billing_cycle is 'annual'.
required_variables.reason: Indicate that the user actually reached the checkout page with a qualifying plan in the draft change, satisfying the 'proceed to the checkout page with that plan selected' requirement.

requirements.task_name: Add a sports add-on under $10/month with 5+ HD sports channels to an existing plan
requirements.task_description: Find and add a sports add-on that costs less than $10 per month and includes at least 5 HD sports channels, then save the updated plan configuration.

required_variables.set_condition: After a successful confirmSubscriptionChange call (return.success === true) and after subscription_addons has been updated for the current subscription, compute the set of active add-ons for that subscription. If there exists at least one active add-on where: (a) addon.category === 'sports', (b) addon.monthly_price < 10, and (c) using addon_channels + channels you can find at least 5 channels linked to this addon with channel.genre === 'sports' and channel.is_hd === true; and if localStorage.task2_addonSelection is not already set, then set this variable.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { addonId: qualifyingAddon.id, subscriptionId: subscription.id, confirmedAt: nowIso }, serialized to JSON.
required_variables.reason: Persist proof that the user saved a plan configuration including a qualifying sports add-on at the time of confirmation, even if later plan/billing changes remove or alter add-ons.

requirements.task_name: Favorite 3 channels: 1 English movie, 1 Spanish news, and 1 all-ages kids channel
requirements.task_description: Locate and add three specific types of channels to the favorites list: one English-language movie channel, one Spanish-language news channel, and one kids channel rated for all ages.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getFavoriteChannelsList is called (i.e., whenever the Favorites / My Channels view is opened), set this variable.
required_variables.reason: Provide evidence that the user opened the favorites list view at least once. Combined with favorite_channels + channels, this allows evaluation of both the correct favorites and the final navigation step.

requirements.task_name: Set up parental controls with a PIN and TV-14 limit and block purchases
requirements.task_description: Sign in, create a 4-digit parental PIN set to 1234, restrict content to TV-14 and below, and enable a setting that blocks purchases without entering the PIN.

requirements.task_name: Upgrade to the plan with more simultaneous streams under $30/month
requirements.task_description: Compare at least two eligible plans under $30 per month and switch to the one that offers the higher number of simultaneous streams.

required_variables.set_condition: When comparePlans is called with an array of at least two planIds, and all corresponding plans exist, have status === 'active', and monthly_price <= 30; and localStorage.task5_comparedPlanIds is not already set.
required_variables.value_to_set: The array of planIds passed into comparePlans (or the first two of them), serialized to JSON.
required_variables.reason: Record that the user compared at least two eligible plans whose monthly price is $30 or less, as required by the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Within confirmSubscriptionChange, before mutating the subscriptions array, determine the 'previous' subscription via _getCurrentSubscription() and its associated current plan (prevPlan). After computing the new plan (plan) and totals, and once the subscription update is successful (return.success === true): if there was an existing subscription, the effectiveDateOption === 'immediately', the new plan's monthly_price < 30, and the new simultaneous_streams_limit (plan.max_simultaneous_streams) is strictly greater than the previous simultaneous streams limit (subscription.simultaneous_streams_limit if set, otherwise prevPlan.max_simultaneous_streams); and if localStorage.task5_upgradeResult is not already set, then set this variable.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { previousPlanId: prevPlan.id, newPlanId: plan.id, previousStreams: previousSimLimit, newStreams: plan.max_simultaneous_streams || null, newMonthlyPrice: totalMonthly, effectiveDateOption, confirmedAt: nowIso }, serialized to JSON.
required_variables.reason: Persist concrete evidence that the user confirmed an upgrade from a lower-stream plan to a higher-stream plan with a monthly cost under $30 and chose the 'start immediately' option.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a recording of a sports program next Friday at 8:00 PM and keep it for 7 days
requirements.task_description: Use the TV guide to find any sports program that starts at 8:00 PM on the next Friday and schedule a recording that is set to be kept for 7 days.

requirements.task_name: Switch to annual billing, apply promo code SAVE20, and select a plan under $200/year
requirements.task_description: Change the billing cycle to annual, apply the promo code SAVE20, then choose an annual plan whose displayed total annual cost is less than $200 and update the subscription.

requirements.task_name: Find a 4K nature documentary series and start playing the first episode
requirements.task_description: Search for a nature-related series, filter results to show only 4K documentary series, and start playback of the first episode of the top matching series.

required_variables.set_condition: When startEpisodePlayback successfully finds an episode (episode != null) and returns success: true. This can be set on every successful playback; the last value represents the most recent episode the user started.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { episodeId: episode.id, seriesId: episode.series_id, startedAt: nowIso }, serialized to JSON.
required_variables.reason: Capture exactly which episode was played so the evaluator can confirm that it is Episode 1 of the first season of a 4K documentary series whose title/tags/synopsis are nature-related.
